body_txt: Basically this is someone who was a master in their field, but they're now behind the times as they haven't been able to keep up with advances in the field. Particularly using newer technologies. This can be done in three ways:  This may involve a Declaration of Personal Independence . This is, of course, Truth in Television . Those who have left a given field may find themselves hopelessly behind on the latest techniques and advancements should they decide to come back years later, and many professions outright require regular training and study in new knowledge if someone wants to continue working legally. Could result in or be a result of Surpassed the Teacher . Sub-Trope to Superior Successor . Not to be confused with Anti-Mentor , which involves mentors who might claim to be a master of a field but can't teach the skills for the life of them. Related to Obsolete Occupation , when an entire career path has gone out of date.
